name: Dove with the Olive Branch
oracleText:
Flying
When Dove with the Olive Branch enters the battlefield, scry 2.
Whenever Dove with the Olive Branch attacks, another target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.
flavorText: "And, lo, in her mouth was an olive leaf pluckt off." — Genesis 8:11
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses a reusable Wikimedia Commons Medhurst illustration of the dove returning to the ark.
